since_last: 37% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.67%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +2.79% · Gold -0.24% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 37% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.67%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.67%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +7.14%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +7.14%, MU +4.94%, VRT +4.07%, LSCC +3.40%, INTC +3.29%. Laggards: SPCX -4.76%, SAP -2.85%, GOOGL -2.27%, SMR -2.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.76% at $176.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
